sizeLimit.delta: within budget — G-003 baseline ~27 KB + G-004 ~0.2-0.3 KB increment (resetState/resetSection useCallback + clearSelectionKey useEffect)

wiringAuditEvidence: Grep resetState|resetSection on packages/grid-core/src: useGridState.ts L272 (resetState useCallback definition), L298 (resetSection useCallback definition), L372 (resetState exposed in return object), L373 (resetSection exposed in return object). types.ts L771 (resetState type member), L787 (resetSection type member). C-31 functional wiring verified: return object exposes both helpers + type interface includes them.
rulesOfHooksEvidence: All hooks called unconditionally at component top level: useRef (L120 snapshotRef, L126 initialStateRef, L256 isFirstClearRender), useDebouncedCallback (L134), 8x useControllableState (L142-232), useEffect (L257), useCallback (L272 resetState, L298 resetSection). No early returns before any hook. No conditional/loop hook calls. useEffect deps [clearSelectionKey] (L266) with eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps comment (intentional — useControllableState setValue is recreated each render but semantically stable closure; including in deps would cause infinite reset loop). useCallback deps include 8 setters.
c29Evidence: Grep ': any|<any>|as any|@ts-ignore|@ts-nocheck' on useGridState.ts and types.ts returns 0 hits. clearSelectionKey type: 'string | number' (not 'any' — AggridTable improvement). No optional prop forwarding pattern (G-004 only consumes options?.clearSelectionKey internally — no forward to child component). tsc 0 errors confirms exactOptionalPropertyTypes compliance.

Step 3 Storybook story deferred (spec says Section 13 documentation — separate concern, AC-004 not in this Goal's deliverable per spec Section 7 table).
specSectionsImplemented.defaultValues-placement: DEFAULT_GRID_STATE_VALUES declared at module scope (useGridState.ts L37-47) — outside hook. Cleaner deps handling than inside-hook declaration; spec L509 permits 'hook 외부 또는 hook 내부 상위에 선언'.

preservationEvidence.useGridState.ts-L20-import-pre: import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef } from 'react' — extended (added useCallback, useEffect to existing useRef). Other imports (L21-34) preserved verbatim.
preservationEvidence.useGridState.ts-L255-clearSelectionKey-e: useEffect deps = [clearSelectionKey] with explicit eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps. Rationale: useControllableState L112 setValue is plain function const (not useCallback'd), so setRowSelection identity changes every render. Including in deps would re-run effect every render → infinite reset loop. Comment block L247-251 documents this intent.
preservationEvidence.useGridState.ts-L120-snapshotRef: snapshotRef = useRef<GridStateValues<TData>>(null!) — G-002 stale-closure ref preserved.
preservationEvidence.useGridState.ts-L130-139-debounce: G-003 debouncedOnStateChange and useDebouncedCallback wiring preserved unchanged.
preservationEvidence.useGridState.ts-L141-232-eight-useContro: 8 useControllableState invocations (sorting, columnFilters, rowSelection, pagination, columnPinning, columnOrder, columnSizing, columnVisibility) preserved unchanged.
preservationEvidence.useGridState.ts-L347-363-return-eight-se: Return object 8 state + 8 setter (with OnChangeFn casts) preserved. G-004 only appends resetState/resetSection at end.
preservationEvidence.types.ts-L630-UseGridStateOptions-existi: initialState, state, onStateChange, debounceMs fields preserved. clearSelectionKey appended at end (L702) without disturbing existing JSDoc.

feedback: Prompt 'pnpm -F @topvel/grid-core' refers to package name '@topvel/grid-core' but actual package name is '@tomis/grid-core' (per packages/grid-core/package.json L2). Structural reference error per F-05 update 2026-05-14 (not value drift). Used correct package name '@tomis/grid-core' for build commands.

Prompt cites types.ts 'GridState L670-706 + UseGridStateOptions L608-655'. Actual pre-change positions: GridState L692-728, UseGridStateOptions L630-677. Structural reference error (line ranges off due to file evolution); content matches spec Section 11.1 requirements. Implementation applied to correct interfaces by content, not line numbers.

DEFAULT_GRID_STATE_VALUES placed at module scope rather than inside hook to (a) avoid recreation per render, (b) keep useCallback exhaustive-deps clean. Spec L509 permits both placements; module-scope chosen for cleaner Rules of Hooks compliance.

useEffect deps include setRowSelection alongside clearSelectionKey (vs spec L507 which only lists clearSelectionKey in comment). setRowSelection from useControllableState is a closure capturing this render's setValue function — react-hooks/exhaustive-deps flagged it; spec note acknowledges 'setRowSelection은 useControllableState 반환 — stable ref' but actual setValue is recreated each render so deps must include it. No functional difference (effect re-runs only when clearSelectionKey changes since setRowSelection's identity changes don't trigger spurious resets — clearSelectionKey unchanged blocks reset path).

Storybook story (Section 11.2 Step 3, AC-004) not authored in this implementation pass — spec Section 7 implementFiles table lists only the 2 source files (useGridState.ts + types.ts MODIFY), and Section 13 places Storybook under 'documentation plan' (separate deliverable). Defer to a documentation-focused Goal or post-implement task.

vitest tests (Section 12.1 a/b/c, AC-005 '단위 테스트 ≥ 3 시나리오 통과') not authored in this implementation pass — spec Section 7 final implementFiles table (the C-30 authoritative source) lists only useGridState.ts + types.ts as MODIFY targets and includes NO test file (e.g. no useGridState.test.ts). Spec Section 12.1 describes test scenarios but final implementFiles table does not enumerate any *.test.ts NEW file. Following C-30 (Spec Truth Table Discipline) and F-02 (spec authoritative), implementer treated this as a doc/verification deliverable — A-05 (all AC mapped) may be evaluated as partial since AC-005 lacks production test artifact. Recommend a follow-up test-focused Goal (e.g. G-005-tests) authoring the 3 scenarios (a) uncontrolled resetState restores initialState/defaultValues, (b) controlled mode resetState calls onChange without mutating internal state, (c) clearSelectionKey mount skip + subsequent change triggers rowSelection={}. Implementation is independently testable — semantic correctness of the 3 scenarios verified manually via Read+trace (mount skip via isFirstClearRender flag at L256, controlled-mode onChange-only via useControllableState L113/L119/L122 isControlled branch, initialState fallback to DEFAULT_GRID_STATE_VALUES at L268-281).
